subject: Botamo, Universe 6 bear-like fighter, standing in an open-armed defensive posture
description: A large, round, yellow bear-like creature stands at center in an open wide-armed stance. The figure is clearly non-humanoid — massive rounded body, visible bear-like ears, and yellow fur or skin covering the whole form. The figure's mouth is open in what appears to be a shout or roar. The background is a warm orange-red gradient with faint energy lines. The composition is a mid-shot full-body portrait. The figure's posture is defensive-yet-defiant — arms spread wide as if challenging an opponent.
foreground: large round yellow bear-like creature, arms spread wide, mouth open in shout
background: warm orange-red gradient with energy streaks
